description: Style NoteThis beautifully toned pair from catwalk are great to tone down a blingy ensemble or class up a simple monochrome theme. We love the colour patterning and overall design aesthetic of this lovely pair. Buy now before we run out of stock!   Product DetailsGold sandals with glittery plastic forefoot and midfoot straps with crsytal embellishments on it and an ankle strap with a tang claspSoft footbed with branding embossed on the heelCrystal embellishments on heel and baseRubber outsole and heel patch with pattern grovesMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean clothSizeHeel: 3.5& rdquo
